items.title: Convex Optimization (Boyd & Vandenberghe)
items.author: Stephen Boyd, Lieven Vandenberghe
items.note: Standard reference for convex sets, functions, and duality—the mathematical foundation behind global optimality guarantees.

items.title: Convexity — Wikipedia
items.author: Wikipedia contributors
items.note: Accessible definitions of convex functions, epigraphs, and second-order tests.

items.title: Identifying and attacking the saddle point problem in high-dimension non-convex optimization
items.author: Dauphin et al.
items.note: Influential discussion of how saddle points (not just local minima) affect neural network training.
